Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
  • Class
    Description
    Health
    Component health result returned from a HealthIndicator.
    Health.Builder
    Builder for Health.
    HealthAggregator
    Shared health-probe aggregation worker bean.
    HealthAggregator.ComponentHealth
    Component payload in the response.
    HealthAggregator.HealthResponse
    Probe response payload.
    HealthIndicator
    Functional SPI for reporting health of one component.
    HealthMixin
    Mixin flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.
    HealthProbe
    Probe categories supported by the built-in health probe resource.
    HealthProbeSettings
    Settings for the built-in health probe resource.
    HealthProbeSettings.Builder
    Builder for HealthProbeSettings.
    HealthResource
    Child-resource flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.
    HealthServlet
    Servlet flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.
    HealthStatus
    Status values returned by HealthIndicator checks.
    ReadinessState
    Shared, observable readiness flag consumed by HealthAggregator to gate the readiness probe.
